# Satoshi API

> The Bitcoin API built for AI agents.

Satoshi API gives AI agents, MCP servers, and autonomous systems
structured access to the Bitcoin network. No node required. Register
a free API key and start querying blocks, fees, mempool, and more
in seconds.

## Why agents choose Satoshi API

- Designed for programmatic consumption: clean JSON envelopes,
  consistent error formats, deterministic pagination
- MCP server available (pip install bitcoin-mcp) so Claude, GPT,
  and other LLM agents can call Bitcoin endpoints as native tools
- Python SDK (pip install satoshi-api) for direct integration
- Free tier with no credit card — agents can self-register via
  POST https://bitcoinsapi.com/api/v1/register
- Low latency (p50 < 40ms), high availability, built on a real
  Bitcoin Core full node

## Quick start for agents

1. Register:
   POST https://bitcoinsapi.com/api/v1/register
   Body: {"email": "agent@example.com", "agreed_to_terms": true}
   Response includes your API key.

2. Query:
   GET https://bitcoinsapi.com/api/v1/fees/recommended
   Header: X-API-Key: <your_key>

3. Every response follows the same envelope:
   {"data": {...}, "meta": {"block_height": 900000, ...}}

## MCP integration (for AI agent frameworks)

Install: pip install bitcoin-mcp
Config: point at https://bitcoinsapi.com with your API key
Provides 35 tools, 6 prompts, and 7 resources that any
MCP-compatible agent can discover and invoke.

## Base URL

https://bitcoinsapi.com

## API docs (OpenAPI)

https://bitcoinsapi.com/docs

## Endpoints (76 total)

Blocks, transactions, mempool, fees, mining, UTXO analysis,
network stats, supply tracking, address lookups, WebSocket
streaming (new blocks, fee changes, mempool activity),
Prometheus metrics, self-serve key registration.

## Rate limits

- Anonymous: lightweight GET only, 144-block cap
- Free: all endpoints, 144-block cap
- Pro: higher limits, 1008-block cap
- Enterprise: custom, 2016-block cap

## Contact

api@bitcoinsapi.com
